nodes.name: 卡魯地區
nodes.summary: 卡魯地區是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括Karoo korhaan、仙玉鹟、Karoo prinia等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: Cape canary
nodes.summary: Cape canary（Cape canary，学名 Serinus canicollis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于卡魯地區，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: This bird on average has a life span of 3.8 years. They also move with irregular flocks sometimes, traveling to non-breeding areas such as the northern Karoo. In the southern Cape, numbers increase during spring, while the species is largely absent from the drier northern parts of its range in summer

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is a residential bird but shows seasonal and altitudinal movements, sometimes forming large flocks outside the breeding season. Its habitat is fynbos, grassland and gardens, preferably in highland areas
